events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Chinese Hospital for client 1066. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: shellfish. Sodium ceiling 700 mg/meal, carbs 40–70 g/meal. Prefers Italian; dislikes cilantro. Cooking ability: microwave. 7 meals/week, zone Excelsior.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Eggplant Parmesan
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'cardiovascular': meal lacks 'heart-healthy' tag.

events.title: Rejected: Baked Ziti
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'cardiovascular': meal lacks 'heart-healthy' tag.

events.title: Matched: Tuscan White Bean Soup
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 413/700 mg ✓, carbs 53 g (target 40–70) ✓, no shellfish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Grilled Chicken with Creamy Polenta
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 445/700 mg ✓, carbs 52 g (target 40–70) ✓, no shellfish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Minestrone with Whole-Grain Roll
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 462/700 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 40–70) ✓, no shellfish ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1066 added to route R-EXCE-2 (Excelsior), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1066: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
